content:
type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
your_files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: Both our features need this same single file, so a fully disjoint split isn't possible. Let's share ownership but keep edits surgical to minimize conflicts: I will (1) add idle_timeout_s: float | None = None param + self._last_chunk_ts = None in StreamListener.__init__, (2) add one line in receive() near the top of the try-block that refreshes self._last_chunk_ts when chunk_message is non-empty, (3) append a new tick(self, now_ts=None) method at the end of the class (after flush()). I will NOT touch your debug/logging lines. Please keep your debug-flag additions to __init__ (separate new param) and add log calls without altering existing control-flow lines/return values. After both done we git merge and hand-resolve any trivial textual conflicts. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT if so.
